description: Experience a seamless and engaging way to confirm your customers' orders with this animated email notification template. Designed in a light, two-column layout with a soothing light blue and crisp white color scheme, it adds a touch of vibrancy with its playful red highlights. This template is perfect for e-commerce businesses, offering a visually appealing way to notify customers about their home delivery or pick up details. From courier information to transportation updates, this template ensures your customers are kept in the loop. Not just a mere notification, its dynamic animation brings to life the anticipation of delivery, making every order confirmation an exciting experience.
short_description: Experience seamless order confirmations with our animated email notification template. Perfect for e-commerce businesses, it offers a visually appealing way to notify customers about home delivery or pick up details. Enjoy its light blue, white and red design.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.
